# Multicollinearity and Ridge Regression {#multicollinearity-ridge}

```{r multicollinearity-ridge-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/multicollinearity-ridge-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/multicollinearity-ridge/"
)
```

```{r child-multicollinearity-ridge, child="../lecture-content/29-multicollinearity-ridge.Rmd"}
```
